description: Creates a dashed 3D line segment between two endpoints with fade-in animation.
utility: Draw a dashed line in 3D space

arguments.name: start
arguments.description: Start point as point3d variable or 3 inline coordinates (x, y, z)

arguments.name: end
arguments.description: End point as point3d variable or 3 inline coordinates (x, y, z)

alternates.description: Dashed line between two point3d variables

examples.scenario: Dashed line between points with color
examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
A = point3d(G, 1, 0, 0)
B = point3d(G, 0, 1, 0)
dashedline3d(G, A, B, c(red))
